steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
Subtracting the second polynomial changes both signs inside the second parentheses:
$$(8x^3+5x)-(7x^3-4x)=8x^3+5x-7x^3+4x$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Group the cubic terms and the linear terms, then simplify:
$$(8x^3-7x^3)+(5x+4x)=x^3+9x$$

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content: The expression in choice A is $x^3+9x$. The other choices change the exponent, coefficient, or constant. The answer is A.
